manual.intro: No worries if you're not a computer whiz. Just follow the steps 😊 — Only remember 3 things: ① Log in ② Explore ③ Buy and Sell
manual.title: Cafe.pi's Easy User Manual

steps: Global Community Marketplace: 200+ languages auto-translation · Pi easy payment · Chat, second-hand, shops all in one app · Connect by distance
Siren Order for All Businesses: Anyone can be an owner · Flexible menu · Instant notifications · O2O pickup
topics.title: Why Cafe.pi?

steps: EVENT #1: Top up with TestPi and complete 10 missions to get 5,000 Bean for the first 100 participants.
EVENT #2: Register your shop, complete menu registration + transaction test, and the first 100 shops get 10,000 Bean.
You can easily complete these by following the participation links for each mission in the Events tab.
topics.title: Events — Join Now

steps: In Pi Browser, press 'Generate Connection Code' to get a 6-digit code (use within 10 minutes).
Copy the code (or link) and paste it into a regular browser.
In the regular browser, after logging in with Google, paste it and press 'Connect' to complete the Pi + Google connection.
Pi Browser doesn't store information for security reasons, so the 6-digit code securely links the two browsers.
topics.title: Log in & Account Connection

steps: 1 Pi = 100 Bean (platform-exclusive credit) — You can start right away with a free plan.
Subscribe only to what you need: PyCafé™ (Premium Cafe) · PyShop™ (Product Registration) · PyTranslate™ (Unlimited Translation)
Subscription fees are paid with topped-up Bean, and annual payments get 2 months free.
topics.title: Bean & Subscriptions

steps: Enter a cafe room of your interest and start chatting for free.
If you turn on 'Nearby Cafes', it shows nearby cafes and neighbours by distance.
With automatic simultaneous interpretation, you can chat with anyone in 200+ languages in your own language.
topics.title: Cafe & Auto-translation

steps: If you upload product photos and prices (Pi), they will be shown to people nearby along with your location.
View items available nearby by distance, and if you like them, order with Pi.
The paid Pi is securely held by the platform (escrow) temporarily, and transferred to the seller once the transaction is complete.
topics.title: Second-hand Marketplace (Secure Transactions)

steps: In 'Shop Registration', if you set your shop name and location, customers will find your nearby shop.
Register menu photos, prices, and quantities.
When a customer orders, you'll receive an instant notification via Telegram (menu · quantity · amount).
Hand over at the shop in the order of Preparing → Ready → Pickup.
topics.title: My Shop (O2O)

steps: The Bean received from the current Testnet event is Cafe.pi's promise.
Once the platform officially launches on Mainnet and Bean is officially issued,
the event tokens earned on Testnet will be paid out identically, 1:1, as Mainnet Bean.
This is Cafe.pi's principle to ensure that the efforts of early participants are not lost.
topics.title: Testnet Rewards, As Is on Mainnet (Promise)

adminStats.scoreFormula: Score = Days Active × 0.2 + Content (Cafe posts, articles, comments) × 0.3 + Number of Payments × 0.5
adminStats.subtitle: Active Users · Revenue Statistics (Based on daily aggregation)

translate.costNote: Estimated cost is an estimate based on the number of characters in the translated text (assuming 1 token ≈ 4 chars, input tokens ≈ output × 2) — please check the Google AI Studio console for the actual billed amount.
translate.noData: No translation data for the period

whitepaper.footer: Meets Pi Network listing criteria (Login, Payment, Security, Data Standards).
whitepaper.highlight1Desc: Supports Pi Account + Google Account. Integrated logins for Kakao, LINE, WeChat, etc., to be added later.
whitepaper.highlight2Desc: Implementation of PiRC1 (Token Economy) · PiRC2 (Subscription Service) · PiRC3 (Escrow Secure Transactions).
whitepaper.intro: Cafe.pi structurally and cryptographically addresses the stringent limitations of Pi Browser, ensuring financial integrity and data standards from its inception.
whitepaper.pillar1Desc: Supports Pi account login and Pi payments as the primary method. Payments are made exclusively with Pi, and Bean is a fixed internal reserve where 1 Pi = 100 Bean.
whitepaper.pillar2Desc: Secure login and payments are enabled with token-based two-factor authentication even in Pi Browser, which does not store cookies. Client gate design without infinite loops.
whitepaper.pillar3Desc: All transactions are recorded in an append-only ledger, and the accounting conservation identity (Issuance = Circulation + Recovery) is constantly verified. Over-issuance and double-spending are structurally impossible.
whitepaper.pillar4Desc: Responds to KISA's 21 web vulnerability standards and defends against forgery, tampering, and timing attacks with HMAC-SHA256 signed tokens and constant-time comparisons.
whitepaper.pillar5Desc: Applies Korea Data Agency (K-DATA) data standards from the first table and enforces them with automatic verification, ensuring long-term operational and audit reliability.
whitepaper.pillar6Desc: Provides fast initial screens and smooth usability through server-first rendering, parallel data fetching, stale-while-revalidate caching, and location, search, and bundle optimisation.
whitepaper.title: Cafe.pi's Technical Strengths

items.a: In the Pi Browser, tap 'Generate Link Code', then log in with Google in a regular browser and paste the code to link your accounts.
It's a platform-exclusive credit. You can top up 1 Pi = 100 Bean to use for subscriptions, gifts, etc. It cannot be exchanged externally.
Payments are made with Pi in the Pi Browser. Product transactions are protected by escrow (secure holding).
items.q: How do I make a payment?

items.a: Upon official Mainnet launch and official Bean issuance, Beans received from Testnet events will be issued 1:1.
items.q: What happens to Beans received on the Testnet?

items.a: Refunds and subscription cancellations follow our policy. Please refer to the refund policy document below for details.
You can submit a report for posts, shops, etc., using the 'Report' button with a reason. Our operations team will review and take action.
It's used to show nearby cafes, stores, and products by distance. Consent can be withdrawn on My Page.

telegram.desc: Since Pi Browser doesn't have its own notifications, we recommend Telegram notifications.
telegram.guideFooter: Once connected, you'll receive Telegram notifications whenever a new order comes in. You'll receive phone notifications even if the app is closed.
telegram.guideStep1: If you don't have the Telegram app on your phone, install it first. (Search for “Telegram” in the App Store/Play Store)
telegram.guideStep2: When you press the “📨 Open Telegram Bot to Connect” button above, Telegram will open.
telegram.guideStep3: At the bottom of the Telegram screen, press the “Start” button once.
telegram.guideStep4: Return to this screen and press “Confirm Connection” to finish! ✅

bond.desc: Deposit 1π to cover 9 cancellation fees — receive 0.1π compensation if buyer cancels.
bond.exhausted: Bond exhausted — switching to no-bond mode until an additional 1π is deposited (no fee reception).
bond.notice: Of the 1π deposited, 0.1π is a reserve and not used to cover fees. The refund feature will be provided after legal review.
bond.title: Seller's Bond
